title: Technical education learner progression survey 2024
body: "This report is based on a survey, carried out in 2024, which covered the second cohort of T Level and level 4 and level 5 learners.  The reports focus on learners’:   destinations and outcomes after the course future plans, including intentions for work or study, and factors shaping their career decisions reflections on their courses   The data tables provide the underlying information for the reports.  The technical annex accompanies the 2 reports.  These reports also uses data from earlier surveys of this cohort for longitudinal analysis, for example relating destinations to course experience.  The technical education learner survey 2023 has findings from the third year of fieldwork.  "
